introSection: Tarántula is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Parque de Atracciones de Madrid in Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders sit back to back, facing away from each other.

fullText:
Tarántula is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Parque de Atracciones de Madrid in Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain.

Orange track and black supports.

Riders sit back to back, facing away from each other.
